title: Recipe for an actor:
content:
To one slice of ham add assortment of roles.
        Steep the head in mash notes till it swells,
     Garnish with onions, tomatoes and beets,
        Or with eggs - from afar - in the shells.

        - Life.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Recipe for an actor:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
